# SoluteLabs Design System

> Visual identity, design tokens, and component specs for solutelabs.com. If you are an AI assistant generating UI for SoluteLabs, start with the README.

## Design system (UI generation)

- [README](README.md): Entry point. Rules, voice, patterns, quick start.
- [Tokens (docs)](tokens.md): Colors, typography, spacing, radius — with intent and Tailwind class mappings.
- [Tokens (CSS)](tokens.css): Plain CSS custom properties for non-Tailwind projects.
- [Tokens (Tailwind v4)](tailwind.css): `@theme` block — drop into globals.css.
- [Components](components.md): Button, Card, Input — full specs with all states.
- [Slides](slides.md): Deck layouts — cover, section divider, case study, stats, leadership, closing.
- [Logo](logo.md): Logo variants, usage rules, animation specs, implementation examples.
- [Assets](assets/): SVGs, favicon, OG image, Lottie animations, fonts, client/partner logos, reference screenshots.

## Brand voice and positioning

- [Brand voice](../brand/brand-voice.md): Voice principles, tone by channel, writing standards.
- [Karan's voice](../brand/karan-voice.md): Founder's personal voice for LinkedIn/social.
- [Company positioning](../positioning/company-positioning.md): Philosophy, messaging pillars, proof points.
- [ICP and messaging](../positioning/icp-and-messaging.md): Buyer personas, fit signals, stage-based messaging.
- [Content playbook](../content/content-playbook.md): Hub-and-spoke strategy, templates, quality gates.

## Key facts

- AI-native product engineering agency, founded 2014
- Website is dark (#171717). Decks and print are light (white). Same tokens, different mode.
- Brand purple: #6622CB (specific, not generic "AI purple")
- Brand orange: #FF4D00 (sparingly — stats, checkmarks, eyebrow bullets)
- Fonts: Archivo (titles) + Manrope (body)
